CEN Response Viewer

Response 219468099

Children's Specialized ABA Enterprise Partner Tuition Discount MOU

Community Engagement (CE) - formal partnership, MOU, LOI, or agreement suggests shared goals.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

An active MOU has been approved and executed which includes a 10% Enterprise Partner tuition discount for all Children's Specialized employees enrolled in MLFC ABA degree and graduate certificate programs.

Question

Activity Start Date / End Date

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question

Public Service or Community Engagement

Community Engagement (CE) - formal partnership, MOU, LOI, or agreement suggests shared goals.

People And Units

Question

ASU Faculty/Staff Involved

  • John O'Brien (Director of Strategic Partnerships) - john.g.obrien@asu.edu
  • Additional ASU collaborators from survey: ABA faculty leads, Dr. Sam DiGigani and Dr. Amanda Boutot. EDPlus partnership operations team (Lessita Villa and Darien Wilson)
  • ASU Institutional Relationship Manager: John O'Brien

Mary Lou Fulton College for Teaching and Learning Innovation
